case_title: JAMES WOOTTEN VS. JASON HOLLOWAY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOOTTEN, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLOWAY, JASON HOLLOWAY, JULIE DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-17-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-02-2003
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HOLLOWAY, JASON HOLLOWAY, JULIE

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-17-2003. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-14-2003 AT 2:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JAN-17-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-27-2003.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR GILBERT B KIRWIN.
ARBITRATOR PAUL TERRY FRIEDMAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-02-2003 THROUGH JUL-01-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
LETTER, ARBITRATOR, PAUL FRIEDMAN TO ARBITRATION DEPT.; IN RE: UNABLE TO SERVE/CONFLICT
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. THE JUL-28-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE APR-24-2003.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN LAWRENCE WININGHAM.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ALVIN J. SCHIFRIN.
ARBITRATOR MICHAEL S. PECHERER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-28-2003 THROUGH JUL-27-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-25-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
ARBITRATOR'S FEE SATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR MICHAEL S. PECHERER
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-21-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. AUG-25-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT HOLLOWAY, JASON HOLLOWAY, JULIE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-21-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
